title: mindwalk report
description: LLM-assisted evaluation of one session trace. Findings come from the judge; dimension verdicts are derived mechanically from finding severities so reports stay comparable across runs.

eventCount.description: Event count of the trace the report was generated from; a cheap display signal — freshness is decided by judge.inputDigest

userTurns.description: User-turn count at generation time; with eventCount it lets list badges spot message-only session growth cheaply

model.description: The LLM that actually judged, as reported by the CLI itself; best-effort, display and comparability only — never part of freshness

requestedModel.description: The alias the run was asked for (e.g. "sonnet"), kept so a repeated aliased request can recognize its own cached report

inputDigest.description: SHA-256 hex of the evidence document the judge read; the report is fresh only while the trace still renders to this digest

verdict.description: max(finding severity), forced to insufficient-data when the trace observability grades the dimension's source signal unavailable

evidenceSeqs.description: Event seqs backing the claim; validated against the trace — invalid references are dropped, and a finding with no valid reference left is dropped entirely
